instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a single-page React application (frontend only).
Use a fixed Top Switcher UI to toggle between the 5 defined design variants.
Store the active variant in React state. Apply the variant's design tokens to the UI (e.g., swapping CSS classes for typography, spacing, border radiuses).
Use the exact content provided in 'content_requirements'.
Use Fontshare CDN for fonts like Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, Clash Display, and Google Fonts for others.
All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
Never use placeholder images. Use only the URLs provided in 'media'.

hero.name: Akansha Jain
hero.greetings: Hello / नमस्ते / Hola / Bonjour / Hallo / こんにちは / Olá / 안녕하세요 / Ciao / สวัสดี / سلام / 你好
hero.subtitle: International conference speaker with 54+ talks across Europe and Asia. Google Women Techmakers Ambassador building the next generation of mobile developers.

featured_talk.title: Offline Mode, Online Impact
featured_talk.subtitle: Building offline-first Flutter applications with practical patterns for resilient, production-grade mobile experiences — live from FlutterNinjas in Tokyo, Japan.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: Discovered Flutter through a GDSC orientation. Founded techtAKe.

timeline.title: Going International
timeline.description: Spoke at Flutter Vikings in Oslo. Won Best Student Award.

timeline.title: Enterprise & Scale
timeline.description: Became Google WTM Ambassador. Delivered corporate talks at Maersk.

timeline.title: Scaling Impact
timeline.description: Invited to Google I/O. Joined Fluttercon India Programme Committee.

timeline.title: New Horizons
timeline.description: Spoke at FlutterNinjas Tokyo and Fluttercon India.

timeline.title: Onwards & Upwards
timeline.description: Named Sessionize Speaker of the Day.

codelabs.title: Building Generative Interfaces with Flutter's GenUI SDK

featured.title: Speaker of the Day
featured.description: Featured by Sessionize as Speaker of the Day, recognizing impactful contributions across 6 events and 6 sessions on the global speaking circuit.

get_in_touch.text: Looking for a speaker who brings deep technical expertise, engaging delivery, and genuine passion for developer communities?

layout.card: bg-transparent border-t border-[#E1DCD1] pt-6 pb-12 rounded-none
layout.button: rounded-full px-8 py-4 border border-[#1A2F24] hover:bg-[#1A2F24] hover:text-[#FDFBF7] transition-all

components.marquee: Slow speed, serif font, huge gaps, text-[#5C6B62]
components.timeline: Central thin line, alternating left/right elegant text blocks
components.stats: No grid boxes, just massive serif numbers with tiny sans-serif labels below, spaced widely

layout.card: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333333] p-6 rounded-none hover:border-[#00FF41] transition-colors
layout.button: rounded-none px-6 py-3 bg-[#050505] border-2 border-[#00FF41] text-[#00FF41] hover:bg-[#00FF41] hover:text-[#050505] font-bold uppercase transition-all

components.marquee: Fast speed, uppercase mono, repeating > prefix, text-[#00FF41]
components.timeline: Left-aligned glowing border, rigid blocky dates like system logs
components.stats: Dense bento grid, exposed borders (border-collapse style), bright neon numbers

layout.card: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
layout.button: rounded-full px-8 py-4 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/20 transition-all text-[#F8F8F8]

components.marquee: Medium speed, elegant sans-serif, high opacity glow effect
components.timeline: Soft glowing central nodes, glassmorphism cards for each milestone
components.stats: Glassmorphic bento cards, metallic gold accents for numbers, deep shadows

layout.card: bg-[#FFDF70] border-4 border-[#111111] p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] transition-all
layout.button: rounded-full px-8 py-4 bg-[#FF4A8D] border-4 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] text-[#111111] font-black uppercase hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] transition-all

components.marquee: Giant outline text, overlapping the background, playful rotation
components.timeline: Zig-zag path with solid black lines, circular nodes in pastel colors
components.stats: Irregular bento grid (Tetris style), mixing yellow, pink, and white backgrounds with hard black borders

layout.button: rounded-none px-8 py-4 bg-[#000000] text-[#FFFFFF] hover:bg-[#FF3333] transition-colors

components.marquee: Clean, tight geometric sans-serif, sharp alignment, monochromatic
components.timeline: Left-aligned strict vertical axis, flush-left content blocks, high typographical hierarchy
components.stats: Strict mathematical 12-column grid structure, flush-left text, negative space used instead of borders
